subject: Preston Whitmore from Disney's Atlantis: The Lost Empire — an elderly distinguished man in a grey suit burning documents over a large open flame
description: An older human figure with wild silvery-white hair blowing upward from the heat stands leaning over a large fire cauldron or open flame pit, feeding what appear to be papers or documents into the flames. The figure wears a grey suit and has a patrician bearing despite the dramatic setting. Sparks and embers scatter upward from the fire. The background suggests a rocky outdoor or semi-sheltered environment at night or dusk. The burning of secrets or evidence aligns with the flavor text's promise-keeping theme — destroying records to protect those involved in an expedition.
foreground: Elderly man in grey suit leaning over a large open fire, papers burning
background: Rocky terrain at night or dusk, flames illuminating
